mapper.sql: id, job_code, job_name, trigger_type, cron_expr, interval_ms, enabled, implemented, last_run_at, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_schedule_job ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM sys_schedule_job WHERE job_code = #{jobCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO sys_schedule_job (job_code, job_name, trigger_type, cron_expr, interval_ms, enabled, implemented, remark) VALUES (#{jobCode}, #{jobName}, #{triggerType}, #{cronExpr}, #{intervalMs}, #{enabled}, #{implemented}, #{remark})
